introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 描述变量之间的离散程度或共同变化，用来判断变化有多宽、是否一起移动。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Differential
introduced_concepts.definition: The change in mean trait value caused by selection before transmission.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 选择作用在遗传传递之前造成的平均性状值变化。

introduced_concepts.name: Imath-bar
introduced_concepts.definition: Imath-bar names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Imath-bar 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 25.18b Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

views.name: Formula 25.18c Relationship
views.definition: Ration of selection of (25.18b) returning the ratio of the total to initial response as (25.18c) ration of selection of (25.18b) returning the ratio of the total to initial response as (25.18c)
views.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness Width
introduced_concepts.definition: A scale parameter controlling how quickly fitness declines away from the optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制性状偏离最优值时适合度下降速度的尺度参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Additive Genetic Variance describes spread or joint movement among variables.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Additive Genetic Variance 描述变量之间的离散程度或共同变化，用来判断变化有多宽、是否一起移动。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Trait Variance describes spread or joint movement among variables.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 描述变量之间的离散程度或共同变化，用来判断变化有多宽、是否一起移动。

introduced_concepts.name: Response
introduced_concepts.definition: The change in mean trait value observed after inheritance or transmission.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 遗传或传递之后观察到的平均性状值变化。

introduced_concepts.name: Infty
introduced_concepts.definition: Infty names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Infty 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 25.18c Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

views.name: Time
views.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
views.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。
